name: get_directions
description: Calculate turn-by-turn driving, walking, or cycling directions between two or more coordinates. Returns one or more routes with geometry, total distance in meters, total duration in seconds, and optional step-by-step navigation instructions.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Routing profile. One of: mapbox/driving-traffic, mapbox/driving, mapbox/walking, mapbox/cycling.

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated list of 2-25 coordinate pairs as 'longitude,latitude'.

parameters.name: alternatives
parameters.description: Whether to return alternative routes (up to 2). Default is false.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Whether to include turn-by-turn instructions. Default is false.

parameters.name: geometries
parameters.description: Format of the route geometry. One of: geojson, polyline, polyline6. Default is polyline.

parameters.name: overview
parameters.description: Detail level of route geometry: full, simplified, or false. Default is simplified.

parameters.name: annotations
parameters.description: Comma-separated metadata to include: distance, duration, speed, congestion, maxspeed.

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Comma-separated road types to avoid: motorway, toll, ferry, unpaved, tunnel.
